Appearances:
Plaintiff 1930-1934 Powell street is present. Represented by Edward Jay.
Attorney Robert Peterson III for the plaintiff.
Defendant Betty Kwan is present.
Attorney Taylor Pospichel appearing for defendant in limited scope.

2:30 pm
The Judge, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 504, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. Defendant Betty Kwan left during settlement without being released per report of both Counsel. The trial date of Jan 19, 2016 remains on calendar. (501/jpt)
